title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Don't cook anything soupy any- more!!

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: It's Proba- Bly a Dead Body....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just like those zombies in the graveyard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And he said it's nearly com- plete.

dialogue.text: There's no way that life will return.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "Yo ho ho ho ho ho ho"...?

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: NUU!!!? Why are you guys here....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: What!? That wasn't brook just now!!?

dialogue.text: who have wandered onto the island,

dialogue.speaker: Perona
